name: Vertical Navigation
description: Navigation component for displaying a vertical list of navigation links with support for nested submenus, icons, and badges.
import: import { VerticalNavigation, VerticalNavigationItem, VerticalNavigationItemContent, VerticalNavigationItemExpansionIcon, VerticalNavigationItemLabel, VerticalNavigationItemTrigger, VerticalNavigationSubMenu } from "@salt-ds/core";

appearance.description: Visual style variant. 'indicator' shows an accent line; 'bordered' shows a border around items.

children.description: VerticalNavigationItem components to render within the navigation.

active.description: Marks the item as the currently active/selected navigation item.

render.description: Custom trigger element (e.g., routing library Link component). Allows client-side navigation.

slots.VerticalNavigationItemContent: Flexible container for trigger and label; supports icons and labels
slots.VerticalNavigationSubMenu: Container for nested child navigation items

keyboard: Tab: Move focus into/out of navigation items
Enter/Space: Select navigation item or reveal submenu when focused on expansion icon
Arrow keys: May be used within custom implementations to navigate sibling items
aria: aria-label or aria-labelledby: Provide accessible name for navigation container
aria-current='page': Apply to VerticalNavigationItem representing current page
role='presentation': Apply to list elements to avoid redundant announcements

with: VerticalNavigationItemContent: Flexible content container with trigger, label, and slots for icons
VerticalNavigationSubMenu: Wrap nested items for hierarchical navigation (with Collapsible for expand/collapse behavior)
Collapsible/CollapsibleTrigger: Enable expand/collapse for nested menus
Badge: Add notification or status indicators to items
SkipLink: Provide keyboard shortcut to skip navigation on multi-page apps
inside: Within fixed app header or sidebar regions for persistent navigation
When wrapped by a container, set container left padding to 0 to keep navigation flush-aligned
Not recommended directly inside scrollable content areas (use fixed positioning)
